title: DashBoard Monthly update

posts.author: nsilva0617 (Nilson Silva)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello everyone, im new to this Automation world.
Ive created a Private Dashboard where my employees are feeding information into the boards daily.
For example i crated one that will add how many clients ive acquired in one month. So i want to receive an email on the 30th of the month with that dashboard that i created instead of checking every month. Is that possible ?

posts.author: BarbaraK (Barbara Kettner)
posts.cookedHtml:
This might work for you:

Click on “Share” button top right in your dashboard and select “Schedule email notification”. See screenshot below:

Screenshot 2021-12-09 at 12.59.341181×687 73 KB

posts.author: nsilva0617 (Nilson Silva)
posts.cookedHtml:
Screen Shot 2021-12-09 at 10.21.56 AM.png3324×1096 272 KB

That option is not available.

posts.author: BarbaraK (Barbara Kettner)
posts.cookedHtml:
Unfortunately that is an Enterprise only feature

image914×300 28.8 KB

posts.author: nsilva0617 (Nilson Silva)
posts.cookedHtml: thank you so much… i appreciate you trying to help.
